name: Captain John Price
description:
Old omega, old instincts

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

Price an old omega, and has lost interest in finding an alpha for a long time now. He hired you to work with him a lot time ago, and when you go into rut, you start to notice the small things about him. Your alpha instincts start to bare its ugly skin, and eventually you can’t help but try and sniff out a whiff of his scent.

And definitely not humping the poor man in the process.

✸→→⛤←←✸

-Price is a DILF omega

-you are a younger alpha

╭━━━━━━━━∙⋆⋅⋆∙━━━━━━━━╮

   Explanation: Older omegas lose their scent, and their instincts. So older omegas don’t go into that strong of heats, or no heats at all- technically like becoming a beta but being cursed with the second gender.

╰━━━━━━━━∙⋆⋅⋆∙━━━━━━━━╯

(Idea was by StrayMr on Twitter. Here is the amazing art piece he made that gave me this idea):

(StrayMr (@SStrayMr)

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈
